## Description
<!-- A clear, concise description of the change and why it's needed. -->

## Type of Change
<!-- Check all that apply -->
- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change that fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change that adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to change)
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Refactoring / code quality improvement
- [ ] CI / tooling change
- [ ] Dependency update

## Related Issues
<!-- Closes #... / Fixes #... / Relates to #... -->

## Changes Made
<!-- Bullet-point summary of what was changed and where. -->
-
-

## Testing
<!-- Describe how you tested these changes. -->
- [ ] Ran `npm test` (all 2600+ tests pass)
- [ ] Ran `npm run build` (no TypeScript errors)
- [ ] Ran `npm run lint` (no lint errors)
- [ ] Added or updated unit tests for new/changed logic
- [ ] Manually tested affected features

## Checklist
- [ ] My code follows the style of this project (no new `@ts-nocheck` lines added without justification)
- [ ] I have reviewed the `TECH_CONSTRAINTS.md` and any new dependencies comply with it
- [ ] I have updated documentation (`README.md`, `docs/`, in-code comments) where relevant
- [ ] I have updated `CHANGELOG.md` with a note in the `[Unreleased]` section
